title: OrchestrationState
description: Persistent orchestration state for the multi-agent scientific workflow controller. Schema version 1.0.0.

orchestration_id.description: Unique identifier for this orchestration instance.

request_id.description: Reference to the orchestration request that initiated this orchestration.

previous_state.description: Previous state before the most recent transition.

transition_id.description: Identifier for the most recent state transition.

transition_reason.description: Human-readable reason for the most recent transition.

eligible_task_ids.description: Task IDs that are eligible for execution given current state.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update.

event_log_cursor.description: Sequence number of the last persisted event.

task_registry_path.description: Path to the task registry file.

handoff_registry_path.description: Path to the handoff registry file.

artifact_contracts_path.description: Path to the artifact contracts directory.

sha_manifests_path.description: Path to the SHA manifests directory.

human_decision_registry_path.description: Path to the human decision registry.

dependency_dag_path.description: Path to the dependency DAG file.
